content.original:
गुरु गोविंद दोऊ खड़े, काके लागू पाँय।
बलिहारी गुरु आपने, गोविंद दियो बताय॥
content.transliteration:
guru govind dou khade, kaake laagu paany.
balihaari guru aapne, govind diyo batay.
content.text: Guru and God both stand before me, whose feet should I touch first? I bow to the Guru, for he is the one who showed me the path to God.
